name: Siemens Fuse EDA AI Agent
description: Domain-scoped autonomous AI agent for planning and orchestrating complex semiconductor, 3D IC, and PCB design workflows. Automates end-to-end design, verification, and manufacturing sign-off with built-in validation and guardrails.
capabilities: Provide natural language interface for EDA operations
notes: Announced March 16, 2026. Built on Siemens Fuse EDA AI foundation with multimodal data lake and RAG pipeline. Leverages NVIDIA Agent Toolkit and Nemotron models. Integrates with Siemens tools (Catapult, Questa One, Tessent, Calibre) and third-party tools. Supports on-premises and air-gapped deployment for IP protection.
